channel.title: Typescript on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Typescript on Arrans github.io

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and product roadmaps in the simplest way possible.

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: evanw/esbuild
item.description: An extremely fast bundler for the web

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: microsoft/TypeScript
item.description: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript output.

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, Capacitor, Ionic, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped
item.description: The repository for high quality TypeScript type definitions.

item.title: open-source-labs/Svelvet
item.description: 🎛 A Svelte library for building dynamic, infinitely customizable node-based user interfaces and flowcharts

item.title: openapi-ts/openapi-typescript
item.description: Generate TypeScript types from OpenAPI 3 specs

item.title: sst/sst
item.description: Build modern full-stack applications on AWS

item.title: AssemblyScript/assemblyscript
item.description: A TypeScript-like language for WebAssembly.

item.title: privatenumber/tsx
item.description: ⚡️ TypeScript Execute | The easiest way to run TypeScript in Node.js

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: padloc/padloc
item.description: A modern, open source password manager for individuals and teams.

item.title: rossmoody/svg-gobbler
item.description: Open source browser extension for finding, editing, exporting, optimizing, and managing SVG content.

item.title: aduros/wasm4
item.description: Build retro games using WebAssembly for a fantasy console.

item.title: OrangeDrangon/android-messages-desktop
item.description: Android Messages as a Cross-platform Desktop App

item.title: vuesion/vuesion
item.description: Vuesion is a boilerplate that empowers product teams to build faster with modern best practices across engineering and design. It features a full-stack framework, comprehensive design system, robust testing, and seamless internationalization.

item.title: visheratin/web-ai
item.description: Run modern deep learning models in the browser.

item.title: b4rtaz/svg-workflow-designer
item.description: Workflow designer written in TypeScript with no dependencies.

item.title: dvcol/synology-download
item.description: A react web extension to manage Synology Download Station’s tasks

item.title: arran4/tsobjectutils
item.description: Some typescript objects I use in a couple repos

item.title: FullScreenShenanigans/FullScreenPokemon
item.description: A free HTML5 remake of the original Pokemon, expanded for modern browsing.

item.title: JavaScriptRegenerated/yieldparser
item.description: Parse using JavaScript generator functions — it’s like components but for parsing!

item.title: OneOfOne/struct2ts
item.description: Generate Typescript classes/interfaces out of Go structs

item.title: dtgorski/typex
item.description: [TOOL/CLI] - Filter and examine Go type structures, interfaces and their transitive dependencies and relationships. Export structural types as TypeScript value object or bare type representations.
